assertions.assertion: Creates a static RsaSecurityKey using RSA.Create(2048) or similar
The CreateAccessToken method accepts subject, audience, and claims parameters
assertions.rationale: Parameters: string subject, string audience, IEnumerable<Claim> claims

assertions.assertion: Uses SecurityTokenDescriptor and JsonWebTokenHandler (or JwtSecurityTokenHandler) to create the token
The WebApplicationFactory replaces JWT Bearer options with TokenValidationParameters that set IssuerSigningKey to the test key
Sets ValidAudience to 'my-api' in the token validation parameters
